title: Redpanda
description: The OpenCTI Redpanda connector publishes OpenCTI knowledge to a Redpanda topic in real time. Leveraging OpenCTI live streams, every create, update and delete event is produced to a Kafka-compatible topic through the Redpanda HTTP Proxy, so downstream consumers (SIEM, data lake, enrichment pipelines) can react to threat intelligence changes.
short_description: Publish OpenCTI events (create/update/delete) to a Redpanda topic via the HTTP Proxy.
